recommendations: 1. Extract duplicate knownRoutes maps (BannerCarousel, HeroNoticeBar, SpecialNoticePopup) to a shared utility
2. Consolidate FALLBACK_TYPE_LABELS and FALLBACK_CONTENT_TYPE_LABELS in PremiumPage.tsx into one shared constant file
3. Consolidate difficultyLabels/difficultyColors (admin/mcq/constants.ts and SearchResultsPage.tsx) into shared constants
4. Replace BookmarkSection's manual type-to-icon mapping with useContentTypes hook's getIcon/getLabel
5. Move GRADIENT_MAP in FeaturedCourses.tsx to be data-driven from content_types DB table
6. Replace QUICK_ACCESS in ClassCategories.tsx with DB-driven quick access links from site_config
7. Make the pass threshold 0.7 in ExamsSection.tsx configurable
8. Move all hardcoded knownRoutes route maps to a single route-resolution utility
9. Make Footer's privacy/terms links dynamic from site_config
10. Make JsonLd.tsx social URLs dynamic from site_config
